title: taraxacum litardieri
intro: Taraxacum litardieri, also known as the French dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum litardieri can be prepared for herbal use through infusion or tincture, and is often consumed as a tea or supplement.
